mapper.select: SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_SN

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_ORDR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_TB (ATCH_FILE_ID, CREAT_DT, USE_AT) VALUES ( #{atchFileId}, SYSDATE(), 'Y')

INSERT INTO FILE_DETAIL_TB ( ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_SN, FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, FILE_SIZE, FILE_CN, FILE_MEMO, FILE_ORDR, UPLOAD_SRC, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DT ) VALUES ( #{atchFileId}, #{fileSn}, #{fileStreCours}, #{streFileNm}, #{orignlFileNm}, #{fileExtsn}, #{fileMg}, #{fileCn}, #{fileMemo}, #{fileOrdr}, #{uploadSrc}, #{creatId}, SYSDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE FILE_DETAIL_TB SET STRE_FILE_NM = CONCAT( #{newDavPath}, SUBSTRING(STRE_FILE_NM, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldDavPath}) + 1) ) , STATE = 'U' , UPDATE_ID = #{updtId} , UPDATE_DT = NOW() WHERE STRE_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{oldDavPath}, '/%')

UPDATE FILE_DETAIL_TB
FILE_CN = #{fileCn},
FILE_ORDR = #{fileOrdr},
UPDATE_ID = #{creatId}, UPDATE_DT = NOW()
WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND FILE_SN = #{fileSn}
mapper.select: SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_CN, FILE_SN, FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, UPLOAD_SRC FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND FILE_SN = #{fileSn}

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D'
ORDER BY a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_SN LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(a.ATCH_FILE_ID) FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D'

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, b.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND UPPER(b.FILE_EXTSN) IN ('GIF','JPG','JPEG','BMP','PNG') AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_SN

SELECT FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, UPLOAD_SRC FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB WHERE STRE_FILE_NM IN
#{nm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOLDER_META_TB (FOLDER_PATH, PATH_HASH, CREAT_ID, UPLOAD_SRC, STATE) VALUES (#{vo.folderPath}, #{vo.pathHash}, #{vo.creatId}, #{vo.uploadSrc}, 'I') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STATE = 'A', -- 재사용 UPLOAD_SRC= VALUES(UPLOAD_SRC), UPDATE_ID = #{vo.creatId}, UPDATED_AT = VALUES(UPDATED_AT);
mapper.select:
SELECT FOLDER_PATH AS folderPath, UPLOAD_SRC AS uploadSrc FROM FOLDER_META_TB WHERE FOLDER_PATH IN
#{p}
mapper.update: UPDATE FOLDER_META_TB SET FOLDER_PATH = CONCAT(#{vo.folderPath}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)) , PATH_HASH = SHA2(CONCAT(#{vo.folderPath}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)), 256) , UPLOAD_SRC = #{vo.uploadSrc} , UPDATE_ID = #{vo.creatId} , UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPrefix}, '/%') AND STATE != 'D'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOLDER_META_TB ( FOLDER_PATH, PATH_HASH, CREAT_ID, UPLOAD_SRC, STATE, CREATED_AT ) SELECT CONCAT(#{newPrefix}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)) AS NEW_PATH, SHA2(CONCAT(#{newPrefix}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)), 256) AS NEW_HASH, #{userId} AS CREAT_ID, 'A' AS UPLOAD_SRC, 'C' AS STATE, SYSDATE() AS CREATED_AT FROM FOLDER_META_TB WHERE (FOLDER_PATH = #{oldPrefix} OR FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPrefix}, '/%')) AND (STATE IS NULL OR STATE != 'D') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FOLDER_PATH = VALUES(FOLDER_PATH), PATH_HASH = VALUES(PATH_HASH), UPDATE_ID = #{userId}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE(), STATE = 'U'

INSERT INTO FILE_DETAIL_TB ( ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_STRE_COURS, FILE_SN, STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, UPLOAD_SRC, STATE, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DT ) SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_STRE_COURS, ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(F2.FILE_SN), 0) + 1 FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB F2 WHERE F2.ATCH_FILE_ID = F.ATCH_FILE_ID ) AS NEW_FILE_SN, CONCAT(#{newPrefix}, SUBSTRING(STRE_FILE_NM, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)) AS NEW_STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, 'A' AS UPLOAD_SRC, 'C' AS STATE, #{userId} AS CREAT_ID, SYSDATE() AS CREAT_DT FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB F WHERE STRE_FILE_NM = #{oldPrefix} AND (STATE IS NULL OR STATE != 'D') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STRE_FILE_NM = VALUES(STRE_FILE_NM), UPDATE_ID = VALUES(UPDATE_ID), UPDATE_DT = VALUES(UPDATE_DT), UPLOAD_SRC = VALUES(UPLOAD_SRC), STATE = VALUES(STATE), ORIGNL_FILE_NM = VALUES(ORIGNL_FILE_NM), FILE_EXTSN = VALUES(FILE_EXTSN)
